Lama isku dari karo isla Lexeme-kiisa.
Fashilantay isku darka Lexeme-yada, fadlan marka hore xalli khilaafaadka jira. Khalad: Lexeme-yadu waxay leeyihiin qaybaha naxwaha ee ereyada oo kala duwan.
wikibase-lexeme-mergelexemes-intro: Haddii aad isku darto laba Lexeme, dhammaan Lemma-yada, Bayaanada, Foomamka iyo Macnayaasha waxaa laga wareejinayaa hal Lexeme oo loo wareejinayaa Lexeme-ka kale.
wikibase-lexeme-mergelexemes-success: $1 waxaa lagu daray $2 waxaana loo sameeyay jiheyn.

wikibase-listdatatypes-wikibase-form-bod: Xiriirinta foomamka mashruuca. Marka qiime la geliyo, magaca "Lexeme" ee mashruuca ayaa la raadin doonaa si loo helo foomamka iswaafaqaya.
wikibase-listdatatypes-wikibase-lexeme-b: Xiriirinta Lexeme-yada mashruuca. Marka qiime la geliyo, magaca "Lexeme" ee mashruuca ayaa la raadin doonaa si loo helo Lexeme-yada iswaafaqaya.
wikibase-listdatatypes-wikibase-sense-bo: Xiriirinta Macnayaasha mashruuca. Marka qiime la geliyo, magaca "Lexeme" ee mashruuca ayaa la raadin doonaa si loo helo Macnayaasha iswaafaqaya.
wikibase-validator-form-not-found: Lexeme-ku ma laha Foom leh aqoonsiga la bixiyay
wikibaselexeme-empty-form-representation: Ma jiro matalaad Foom oo la qeexay
wikibaselexeme-error-cannot-remove-last-: Khalad ayaa dhacay: Lemma-da ugu dambeysa lagama saari karo.
wikibaselexeme-form-representation-redun: Suurtagal ma aha in la geliyo matalaado badan oo leh isla nooca higgaadda.
wikibaselexeme-grammatical-features-inpu: Tusaale ahaan: caadiyeed, isbarbardhig, waqti hore...
wikibaselexeme-lemma-edit-placeholder: Lemma-du badanaa waa qaabka ugu gaaban ee erayga
wikibaselexeme-lemma-redundant-language: Suurtagal ma aha in la geliyo Lemma-yo badan oo leh isla nooca higgaadda.
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-info-panel-lexi: Lexeme-yadu waxay ka kooban yihiin [[Special:MyLanguage/Project:Lexicographical data|xogta qaamuuska]] oo ah xog ku saabsan erayo ama weedho, sida luuqadda, asal raaca erayga, isbeddellada erayga, iwm. Waa kan tusaale:
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-info-panel-no-g: Lexeme-yadu kuma jiraan xog guud (taariikhda dhalashada, taariikhda furitaanka, qoraaga, waddanka, isku duwayaasha, bogga internetka, iwm.) oo ku saabsan hay'adda ama fikradda ay tixraacayaan. Haddii aad rabto inaad gudbiso xog guud, waxaad u baahan tahay inaad [[Special:NewItem|abuurto Shay]] halkii.
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-invalid-languag: Shaygan wuxuu leeyahay koodh luuqadeed aan la aqoonsan. Fadlan dooro mid ka mid ah kuwa hoose.
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-language-empty-: Goobta luuqadda Lexeme-ka ma noqon karto mid madhan.
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-language-invali: Luuqadda Lexeme-ku waa inay noqotaa Shay sax ah.
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-lemma-empty-err: Goobta Lemma-da ma noqon karto mid madhan.
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-lemma-language-: Goobta nooca higgaadda ma noqon karto mid madhan.
Nooca higgaaddu waa inuu noqdaa koodh luuqadeed sax ah.
Koodhka luqadda ee nooca higgaadda ee Lemma-da, tusaale ahaan 'so'
Koodhka luuqadda ee nooca higgaadda ee Lemma-da, tusaale ahaan '$1'
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-lemma-placehold: Foomka gaaban ee erayga, tusaale ahaan 'marka hore'
Foomka aasaasiga ah ee erayga, tusaale ahaan '$1'
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-lexicalcategory: Goobta qaybta naxwaha ee ereyga ma noqon karto mid madhan.
Qaybta naxwaha ee ereyga waa inay noqotaa Shay sax ah.
Qaybta naxwaha ee Lexeme-ka, tusaale ahaan '$1'
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-search-existing: Waxaad hubin kartaa in Lexeme uu hore u jiray adigoo isticmaalaya [$1 raadinta]. Waxaad sidoo kale wax badan ka baran kartaa Lexeme-yada sanduuqa caawinta ee hoose.
wikibaselexeme-newlexeme-submit-error: server-ku wuxuu la kulmay khalad ku meel gaar ah mana uusan dhammaystiri karin codsigaaga. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
wikibaselexeme-sense-gloss-invalid-langu: Koodhadhka luqadaha macne sharaxaadda waa inay noqdaan kuwo sax ah
wikibaselexeme-sense-gloss-redundant-lan: Suurtagal ma aha in la geliyo macne sharaxaadyo badan oo leh isla luuqadda.
